quality_note: Expert review packets route review work. They are invitations to verify, not certificates of completion.

packets.title: Source Custody And OCR Review
packets.reviewer_profile: Historian of technology, archivist, or careful source transcriber.
packets.scope: Check source manifests, editions, OCR, page maps, public source links, and scan access.
tasks: Confirm edition/year/publisher fields for each source.
Check OCR readings only against scans or trusted editions.
Record missing checksums, page maps, and public archive links.

packets.title: Equation Canon And Notation Review
packets.reviewer_profile: Electrical engineer, mathematician, or power-systems educator.
packets.scope: Review the first equation canon, notation translations, units, and worked-example readiness.
tasks: Separate Steinmetz notation from modern notation.
Check dimensions, assumptions, RMS/maximum conventions, and sign conventions.

packets.title: Diagram Provenance Review
packets.reviewer_profile: Engineer, technical illustrator, or documentation reviewer.
packets.scope: Check original crops, crop boxes, figure numbers, captions, checksums, and redraw labels.
tasks: Verify each crop against the source scan and figure caption.
Confirm redraws are labeled as reconstruction.
Link diagrams to concepts, equations, and source text sections.

packets.title: Concept And Glossary Review
packets.reviewer_profile: Electrical theory reader, historian, or terminology specialist.
packets.scope: Promote generated concept hits into source-located definitions and glossary pages.
tasks: Distinguish original usage from modern equivalent.
Mark obsolete, renamed, absorbed, or still-current terms.
Add exact source locations before calling a definition canonical.

packets.title: Patent Authority Pass
packets.reviewer_profile: Patent researcher, apparatus historian, or electrical engineer.
packets.scope: Turn the seeded patent register into verified patent dossiers with PDFs, drawings, claims, and theory links.
tasks: Download and checksum each patent PDF.
Link patents to Steinmetz theory only where a source-located overlap exists.

packets.title: Interpretive Boundary Review
packets.reviewer_profile: Modern EE reader, Tesla-era researcher, or alternative-field researcher.
packets.scope: Check that modern, Tesla-era, and ether-field readings remain labeled and never replace Steinmetz source claims.
tasks: Mark explicit Steinmetz statements separately from interpretive readings.
Prevent cross-author synthesis from being presented as historical fact.
Add source references or downgrade unsupported claims to questions.
